source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A 500-loop circular wire coil with radius \( 4.00 \ \mathrm{cm} \) is placed between the poles of a large electromagnet. The magnetic field is uniform; it decreases at \( 0.200 \ \mathrm{T/s} \). What is the magnitude of the induced emf?
